src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/Applic.general_idea: Update the import statement for EntityScan to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 2.x.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Remove inheritance from the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class to comply with Spring Boot 2.x / Java 11 standards.
Update import for FilterRegistrationBean to the new package location in Spring Boot 2.x.
Add generic type parameter to FilterRegistrationBean to satisfy Java 11 / Spring Boot 2.x type safety requirements.
Change CSRF token handling from setting a cookie via a filter to including the token in the JSON response payload.
Remove the call to the CSRF cookie filter since the token is now embedded in the response body.
